title: Diversion Programs * Adolescents - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > Diversion Programs * Adolescents 2 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF YAMHILL COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH FAMILY & YOUTH SERVICES YOUTH MENTAL HEALTH AND SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assessment and treatment for mental health, drug and alcohol abuse. Provides dual-diagnosis and intensive mental-health services for teens. Operates Minor in Possession (MIP) Diversion program, adolescent sex offender program and assists young survivors of sexual abuse. The Parent Child Interaction Therapy (PCIT) program provides treatment for conduct-disordered children. Services delivered after an assessment and treatment plan is developed. 420 NE 5th Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Age 21 and younger Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5:30pm, extended hours by appointment (503) 343-7462 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YAMHILL COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH YOUTH MENTAL HEALTH AND SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assessment and treatment for mental health, drug and alcohol abuse. The Parent Child Interaction Therapy (PCIT) program provides treatment for conduct-disordered children.
